name: Creme De Menthe Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 9-inch, heat-resistant, non-metallic pie pan, melt butter in Microwave Oven for 1 minute.
2. Combine cookie crumbs and sugar in a small bowl until well blended.
3. Stir the cookie mixture into the melted butter.
4. Press the mixture onto the bottom and sides of the pie pan.
5. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes or until the crust has a crunchy texture. Allow to cool while preparing the filling.
6. In a large, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl, combine marshmallows and milk.
7. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes or until marshmallows begin to puff. Stir to blend. If not completely melted, return to Microwave Oven for an additional 10 to 15 seconds.
8. Stir in crème de cocoa and crème de menthe.
9. Chill until thickened but not set, about 20 minutes.
10. Fold in whipped cream.
11. Pour the mixture into the crust.
12. Refrigerate at least 4 hours.
13. Serve garnished with chocolate curls.
